evals.name: direct-trigger-en
evals.expected_output: Skill 'cr-content-repurposer' is triggered and produces structured output
expectations: Output follows the skill's documented workflow steps

evals.name: direct-trigger-zh
evals.prompt: 把这篇文章改成推特版
evals.expected_output: 技能 'cr-content-repurposer' 被正确触发并生成结构化输出
expectations: 正确触发了 cr-content-repurposer 技能
输出遵循技能文档中的工作流步骤

evals.name: indirect-trigger
evals.prompt: I wrote a long article, now I need versions for each platform
evals.expected_output: Skill 'cr-content-repurposer' is correctly matched despite indirect phrasing
expectations: Routes to cr-content-repurposer skill despite not using exact keywords
Asks for necessary clarifications before proceeding

evals.name: output-structure
evals.prompt: repurpose this article for Twitter. Use minimal sample data — I just want to verify the output format is correct.
evals.expected_output: Produces output matching the skill's documented deliverable format
expectations: Artifact is saved to the correct path per conventions
Markdown formatting is correct if applicable
